title: Extract Website URLs
scenario: Extract website URLs from the following text: Visit our website at https://example.com or http://example.org. The output should be a comma-separated list of extracted URLs.
constraints: Must be in the format of an HTTP or HTTPS URL

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets the format and character constraints.
Verify if each extracted URL starts with 'http://' or 'https://'.
